Class AlcoholLogController

java.lang.Object
ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AlcoholLogController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1/alcohol-logs") public class AlcoholLogController extends Object
REST controller for alcohol compliance log operations.

Provides endpoints for creating and retrieving alcohol log entries as part of the IK-Alkohol compliance module. All endpoints require authentication.

Base path: /api/v1/alcohol-logs

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AlcoholLogController(AlcoholLogService alcoholLogService)
    Creates a new alcohol log controller instance.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<AlcoholLogResponse>
    createLog(@Valid AlcoholLogRequest request, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
    Creates a new alcohol log entry for the current shift.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<AlcoholLogResponse>>
    getCurrentDayLogs(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
    Returns alcohol log entries recorded for the current day.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<AlcoholLogResponse>>
    getLogsByDate(LocalDate date, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
    Returns alcohol log entries for a specific date.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?>
    getTodayStatus(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
    Returns whether any alcohol logs have been recorded for the current day.

  • Constructor Details

    • AlcoholLogController

      public AlcoholLogController(AlcoholLogService alcoholLogService)
      Creates a new alcohol log controller instance.
      Parameters:
      alcoholLogService - the service handling alcohol log business logic

  • Method Details

    • createLog

      @PostMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<AlcoholLogResponse> createLog(@Valid @RequestBody @Valid AlcoholLogRequest request, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Creates a new alcohol log entry for the current shift.
      Parameters:
      request - the alcohol log request body
      authentication - the current authentication object used to identify the user
      Returns:
      the saved AlcoholLogResponse

    • getCurrentDayLogs

      @GetMapping("/current-shift") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<AlcoholLogResponse>> getCurrentDayLogs(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Returns alcohol log entries recorded for the current day.
      Parameters:
      authentication - the current authentication object
      Returns:
      a list of AlcoholLogResponse entries for today

    • getLogsByDate

      @GetMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<AlcoholLogResponse>> getLogsByDate(@RequestParam @DateTimeFormat(iso=DATE) LocalDate date, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Returns alcohol log entries for a specific date. Intended for use by managers and administrators reviewing historical data.
      Parameters:
      date - the date to filter by, in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD)
      authentication - the current authentication object
      Returns:
      a list of AlcoholLogResponse entries for the given date

    • getTodayStatus

      @GetMapping("/status") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getTodayStatus(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Returns whether any alcohol logs have been recorded for the current day. Used by the dashboard to indicate compliance status.
      Parameters:
      authentication - the current authentication object
      Returns:
      a map with a hasLogs boolean field
